title: Simple Navigation Demo
description: Navigate through pages and show key features

steps.title: Introduce the app
steps.narration: Welcome to this demo. We are going to explore the main pages of the application.

steps.title: Describe dashboard
steps.narration: This is the dashboard. It provides an overview of all key metrics and recent activity.

steps.title: Describe settings
steps.narration: The settings page allows you to configure the application to match your needs.

steps.title: Conclusion
